stemHtml: An aircraft on an IFR flight in IMC under radar control experiences radio communication failure. What is the aircraft expected to do?

options.a: Maintain the last assigned speed and level (or minimum flight altitude if higher) for 20 minutes after failing to report over a compulsory reporting point, then adjust level and speed per the filed flight plan.
options.b: Proceed to an area where VFR flight is possible.
options.c: Maintain last assigned speed and level (or minimum safe altitude if higher) for 7 minutes, then divert to the nearest suitable aerodrome.
options.d: Maintain last assigned speed and level (or minimum safe altitude if higher) for 7 minutes, then proceed per the flight plan to the destination navigation aid.
